# zstack_image_store_backup_storage (Resource)

Manages an Image Store Backup Storage in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `hostname` (String) The hostname or IP address of the image store backup storage
- `name` (String) The name of the image store backup storage
- `password` (String, Sensitive) The password for SSH access to the image store backup storage
- `url` (String) The URL of the image store backup storage
- `username` (String, Sensitive) The username for SSH access to the image store backup storage

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the image store backup storage
- `ssh_port` (Number) The SSH port of the image store backup storage

### Read-Only

- `available_capacity` (Number) The available capacity of the backup storage in bytes
- `state` (String) The state of the backup storage
- `status` (String) The status of the backup storage
- `total_capacity` (Number) The total capacity of the backup storage in bytes
- `type` (String) The type of the backup storage
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the image store backup storage
